rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VIRGIL OWENS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to october 27, 2015 (10/21/15 not available). although counsel left a voicemail message saying she would be filing documents on 10/2/15, nothing was filed. Counsel left a second voicemail message stating she would be filing the documents on Monday, the day before the hearing. Local Rule 14.14.6 states the deadline for filing documents is 3 court days prior to the hearing date (in this case, no later than 10/1/15).
